training_status: 6-7 days per week training, 13% body fat

benefits.description: Expected improvement from Tesamorelin after positive results on Sermorelin
Expected improvement from Tesamorelin after positive results on Sermorelin

protocol_notes: Transitioned from Sermorelin (0.10ml/10 units per night) to Tesamorelin (0.25ml/25 units per night). 5 days on, 5-6 week cycle prescribed by doctor. Only 4 days into new protocol at time of posting. No issues reported yet. Actual dose in mg unclear from post; commenters suggest 0.25ml likely equals approximately 2mg based on standard reconstitution.
